trending_themes.evidence: All four members at Met Gala May 5, 2026 — Jisoo's debut. Iconic bathroom selfie broke Met Gala rules and dominated social media.

trending_themes.theme: DEADLINE EP — biggest female Spotify album debut 2026
trending_themes.evidence: Released Feb 27, 2026; 16.9M Spotify streams first day. 'GO' at #9 daily global; 'Champion' praised as empowerment anthem.

trending_themes.theme: Member solo success feeding group identity
trending_themes.evidence: Jennie: first Hot 100 top 10 ('Dracula' w/ Tame Impala). Rosé: Grammy performance, first K-pop Brit Award winner. Lisa: FIFA World Cup opening ceremony + Vegas residency.
Major worldwide tour kicking off summer 2026.

notable_movements: DEADLINE: biggest female album debut Spotify 2026
Rosé first K-pop Grammy performer + Brit Award winner

annotation_hooks: Group identity reinforced through individual autonomy — members' solo success (Grammy/Brits/Vegas) feeds group confidence; DEADLINE positions them as artists choosing to reunite, not contractually obligated
Fashion moments as cultural currency: Met Gala bathroom selfie generated more engagement than chart metrics — reflects evolved K-pop consumption
'Champion' thematic shift toward resilience aligns with members' individual autonomy narratives — less party K-pop, more professional independence
raw_headlines: BLACKPINK Complete at Met Gala 2026 as Jisoo Makes Event Debut
DEADLINE Scores Biggest Female Album Debut on Spotify 2026
Jennie Joins Rosé as Second BLACKPINK Member to Score Solo Hot 100 Top 10
Rosé Makes History as First K-pop Soloist at Grammy Awards 2026
Lisa Performs at 2026 FIFA World Cup Opening Ceremony
BLACKPINK Announces Deadline World Tour May 16
